question: What are the two primary modes available on a vacuum cleaner that can be used to tailor its performance to meet different home cleaning needs?
content: The two modes are Virtual Wall Mode and Halo Mode. Virtual Wall Mode creates a linear barrier to block openings up to 10 ft (3 m). Halo Mode creates a circular barrier about 12 in (30 cm) from the center of the device to keep the robot away from areas such as a pet bowl, vase, or under a desk.
ret: "The two modes are Virtual Wall Mode and Halo Mode. Virtual Wall Mode creates a linear barrier to block openings up to 10 ft (3 m). Halo Mode creates a circular barrier about 12 in (30 cm) from the center of the device to keep the robot away from areas such as a pet bowl, vase, or under a desk.",[]
